version: 2.x（基于 Fandom Wiki 2026 核对，共12图；补充多张地图策略）

maps.name: 星枢殖民地
maps.summary: 经典太空站，狭窄通道与环形房间交错，有运输舱通往独立坞区。
maps.summaryEn: Classic space station with narrow corridors intersecting ring rooms; transport pods lead to an isolated dock area.

annotations.label: 中央会议按钮
annotations.note: 位于地图中心，紧急会议在此召集
annotations.noteEn: Located at map center; emergency meetings are called here.

annotations.label: 上层电力室
annotations.note: 接线任务集中区，注意落单
annotations.noteEn: Wiring tasks concentrate here; avoid being alone.

annotations.label: 医疗室
annotations.note: 扫描任务，单人停留时间长易被刀
annotations.noteEn: Scan tasks take time; easy target when alone.

annotations.label: 下层走廊死角
annotations.note: 无监控覆盖，鸭子常在此卡视野单杀
annotations.noteEn: No camera coverage; ducks often use vision blocks for solo kills here.

annotations.label: 中部通风口
annotations.note: 连接上下层，鸭子快速转移
annotations.noteEn: Connects upper and lower levels for fast duck movement.

annotations.label: 独立坞区
annotations.note: 仅运输舱可达，进去前确认同行者身份
annotations.noteEn: Only reachable by pod; confirm allies before entering.

goose: 任务尽量结伴，下层死角和独立坞区不要单独进。独立坞区只有运输舱能到，进去前必须确认同行者身份。
记住监控覆盖范围，沿监控路线走更安全；做电力或医疗等长任务时请队友站在监控附近盯场。
反应堆/氧气破坏要立刻分两路去修，千万别全挤一路——鸭子喜欢在修复点卡视野单杀。
duck: 利用中部通风口在上下层之间游走找单，通风口连接快，是快速换层的最佳路径。
把目标引向下层走廊死角再卡视野，这里没有监控，适合秒杀后立刻通风口撤离。
破坏氧气逼鹅分散，制造单杀机会；破坏后自己去另一路假装修，观察谁没来制造不在场证据。
neutral: 鹈鹕在独立坞区吞人最隐蔽，吞完可以等运输舱冷却再带人出去。
猎鹰可借太空服伪装混入任务流，注意别在监控下暴露飞行轨迹。

goose: Do tasks in pairs; avoid entering lower blind spots or the isolated dock alone. The dock is only reachable by pod — confirm your companion before entering.
Memorize camera coverage and walk routes under surveillance when possible. For long tasks like wiring or medbay scan, ask a friend to watch cameras nearby.
When reactor/oxygen is sabotaged, split into two groups to fix immediately. Never all go the same way — ducks love camping repair points for solo kills.
duck: Use the central vent to move between floors and hunt isolated players. Vents are the fastest way to change levels undetected.
Lure targets to the lower corridor corner then block vision for the kill. No camera coverage here; vent away immediately after.
Sabotage oxygen to force geese to split up and create solo kill opportunities. Fake repair on the other path while watching who doesn't show up.
neutral: Pelican can swallow most discreetly inside the isolated dock. Wait for pod cooldown before bringing the swallowed player out.
Falcon can disguise with a spacesuit and blend into task flow — avoid exposing flight paths on camera.

tips: 有前置任务，开局先解锁任务列表
太空图有监控，刀人前先看监控位置
tipsEn: Pre-tasks present; unlock the full task list at round start.
Space map has CCTV; always check camera positions before attempting a kill.

maps.name: 黑天鹅号
maps.summary: 大型太空船，路线长、人流分散，节奏偏慢，冷门但适合伏击。
maps.summaryEn: Large spaceship with long routes and dispersed traffic; slower pace, niche but great for ambushes.
tips: 地图大人易散，鹅方更要主动抱团
冷门图，多数人不熟点位，先看小地图
tipsEn: Large map makes players spread out; geese should actively stick together.
Niche map; most players unfamiliar with spots — study the minimap first.

annotations.label: 会议按钮
annotations.note: 紧急按钮在娱乐室，出事先想好走食堂还是通讯间哪条路报点最快
annotations.noteEn: Emergency button in the rec room; decide fastest report route via cafeteria or comms before calling.

annotations.label: 货舱气闸
annotations.note: 舱外『拉至密封』做完后舱门紧闭，被关在里面的人会被舰桥拉杆全员放逐，听到关门声立刻撤
annotations.noteEn: After 'seal' task outside cargo, doors lock; anyone trapped can be ejected by bridge lever — leave immediately on hearing seal sound.

annotations.label: 舰桥操纵杆
annotations.note: 鸭子可在此拉杆把货舱内所有人弹出太空，看到有人独自蹲守舰桥要盘他逻辑
annotations.noteEn: Ducks can eject everyone in cargo by pulling lever; if someone is camping bridge alone, question their logic.

annotations.label: 监控前置
annotations.note: 监控和对讲机都在保安室，但要先做完激活前置任务才能用，前期别指望盘监控
annotations.noteEn: Cameras and radio are in security but require pre-task activation; don't rely on cams early.

annotations.label: 舱门走廊
annotations.note: 舱门破坏点所在走廊，鸭子常关门切断舰桥支援后在此堵人单刀，落单别走
annotations.noteEn: Corridor with airlock sabotage; ducks often close doors to cut bridge support then block solo players here.

annotations.label: 风口网络
annotations.note: 全图7个风口分两组互不连通，还藏一间只能钻风口进的密室，见人原地消失先想风口走向
annotations.noteEn: 7 vents in two disconnected groups + one hidden room only accessible via vent; if someone vanishes, think vent paths.

annotations.label: 氧气破坏点
annotations.note: 氧气（生命维持）破坏点在孵化室，响氧气时人流涌向这里，鸭子常借机在空出来的区域收刀
annotations.noteEn: Oxygen (life support) sabotage point in incubation; players rush here — ducks exploit empty zones for kills.

annotations.label: 反应堆盲区
annotations.note: 图大人散的远端角落，落单来修反应堆易被蹲，鸭子常在此卡视野单杀
annotations.noteEn: Distant corner on large map; solo reactor fixes are easy to camp — ducks love vision blocks here.

goose: 地图大、人分散，优先抱团做任务，别独自跑远端盲区修反应堆。
有前置任务，开局先解锁完整任务列表，规划路线避免绕远。
氧气/反应堆破坏立刻分头两路修，千万别全挤一路被蹲。
利用监控观察大范围动向，任务时请队友盯监控减少落单风险。
duck: 大地图适合伏击，挑偏僻长路或盲区蹲点，慢节奏给更多准备时间。
氧气破坏后鹅会分散，借机在另一路卡视野秒杀后快速通风口撤离。
利用通风口在宽阔区域快速转移，制造多处不在场证据。
灯光破坏配合长走廊，黑暗中更容易接近目标并用通风管逃脱。
neutral: 鹈鹕可在大地图边缘封闭区吞人，吞完利用慢节奏慢慢消化到会议。
猎鹰适合伪装混入慢任务流，注意别因不投票或异常走位暴露。

goose: Large map + dispersed players: stick together for tasks. Never solo far-end blind spots like reactor repairs.
Pre-tasks present — unlock full list early and plan routes to avoid long unnecessary walks.
On oxygen/reactor sabotage, immediately split into two repair groups. Clustering is deadly.
Use cameras for wide-area intel. Ask a teammate to watch cams while you handle long tasks.
duck: Slow pace and long sightlines favor ambushes. Camp remote corridors or blind corners.
Sabotage oxygen to split the Geese, then vision-block kill on the other path and vent away fast.
Vents let you reposition quickly across the large space and create multiple alibis.
Lights sabotage + long corridors = easy approach and vent escape in the dark.
neutral: Pelican can swallow safely in remote enclosed areas on the edges; slow pace gives time before meetings.
Falcon blends into the slower task flow. Avoid skipping votes or weird movement patterns.

maps.name: 鹅妈妈号
maps.summary: 基于 Among Us 经典布局的太空母舰，横向动线，货舱气闸是核心陷阱杀。
maps.summaryEn: Classic Among Us-style mothership with horizontal flow; the cargo airlock is the signature trap-kill mechanic.

annotations.label: 娱乐室 会议按钮
annotations.note: 中央钢琴旁的桌上，紧急会议在此召集
annotations.noteEn: On the table by the central piano; emergency meetings called here.

annotations.label: 电力室
annotations.note: 灯光破坏点，接线任务集中，狭窄易被堵
annotations.noteEn: Lights sabotage point; wiring hub, narrow and easy to block.

annotations.label: 反应堆
annotations.note: 反应堆破坏需两人同按，落单进来很危险
annotations.noteEn: Reactor sabotage requires two players simultaneously; entering alone is dangerous.

annotations.label: 孵化室
annotations.note: 生命维持破坏点，偏僻死角
annotations.noteEn: Life support sabotage point; remote dead-end.

annotations.label: 舰桥
annotations.note: 通讯破坏点 + 气闸操纵杆，鸭子拉杆触发陷阱
annotations.noteEn: Comms sabotage + airlock lever; ducks pull to trigger trap.

annotations.label: 安保室通风口
annotations.note: 连接监控室，鸭子常用此快速转移
annotations.noteEn: Connects to security/monitor room; ducks use for quick escape.

annotations.label: 安保室
annotations.note: 监控所在，可远程看人，刀前先确认无人盯监控
annotations.noteEn: Contains cameras; check no one is watching before killing.

annotations.label: 货舱 气闸陷阱
annotations.note: 站在货舱可能被吸出太空！鸭子可借此无冷却杀人，非任务别久留
annotations.noteEn: Standing in cargo can get you sucked into space! Ducks can use for cooldown-free kills; don't linger without tasks.

annotations.label: 货舱死角
annotations.note: 远离主动线、无人经过，气闸+单杀双重危险
annotations.noteEn: Off main routes, rarely passed; double danger from airlock + solo kill.

annotations.label: 下层走廊
annotations.note: 长走廊视野盲区，鸭子卡视野单杀高发
annotations.noteEn: Long corridor with vision blocks; high frequency solo kills by ducks.

goose: 货舱没任务就别进，气闸陷阱可无冷却秒杀
记住监控在安保室，做任务时可请人盯监控
反应堆/生命维持破坏要立刻两路分头去修，别全挤一处
走长走廊尽量结伴，别落单
duck: 把目标往货舱引，用气闸陷阱杀人不算刀且可隐藏
下层长走廊卡视野单杀，杀完从安保室通风口转移
拉舰桥操纵杆前先确认货舱有人
破坏灯光制造黑暗趁机动手
neutral: 鹈鹕在货舱或孵化室等封闭死角吞人最隐蔽
猎鹰可借太空服伪装混入任务流，注意别因不投票露馅

goose: Stay out of cargo unless on task — the airlock trap kills with no cooldown.
Cameras are in security; ask teammates to watch cams while you task.
Split into two groups immediately for reactor / life support fixes; don't cluster.
Travel long corridors in pairs; never alone.
duck: Lure targets into cargo; airlock kills don't count as stabs and hide the body.
Vision-block solo kills in lower corridor, then vent out from security.
Confirm someone is inside cargo before pulling the bridge lever.
Sabotage lights to create darkness and make your move.
neutral: Pelican swallows most hidden in cargo or incubation closed corners.
Falcon can disguise using spacesuit to blend into taskers; avoid skipping votes to not expose.

tips: 货舱气闸是本图标志性陷阱杀，新手最易中招
有只能通过通风管进入的密室
采用率偏低，熟点位的人优势明显
tipsEn: Cargo airlock is the map's iconic trap-kill; new players fall for it easily.
Secret room only accessible via ventilation ducts.
Low pick rate means players who know the spots have a big edge.

maps.name: 野鸭庄园
maps.summary: 阴暗庄园，无通风管，但可藏身树叶与柜子，室内外动线分明。
maps.summaryEn: Dark manor with no vents, but foliage and cabinets provide hiding spots; clear indoor/outdoor flow.

annotations.label: 大厅会议铃
annotations.note: 庄园中央大厅
annotations.noteEn: Central hall of the manor.

annotations.label: 庭院任务区
annotations.note: 室外修破坏点,视野开阔较安全
annotations.noteEn: Outdoor sabotage repair; open sightlines make it relatively safe.

annotations.label: 二楼柜子
annotations.note: 无通风管图的藏身点,可蹲守或躲刀
annotations.noteEn: Hiding spot unique to no-vent maps; can camp or dodge kills.

annotations.label: 侧厅拐角
annotations.note: 无监控、视野遮挡多,单杀高发
annotations.noteEn: No cameras, lots of sight blockers; high solo-kill area.

annotations.label: 庭院树叶
annotations.note: 可藏身,鸭子也可借此伏击
annotations.noteEn: Can hide; ducks also use to set up ambushes.

goose: 没有通风管，看到有人凭空消失高度可疑——立刻盘问并搜查附近树叶/柜子。
室外庭院视野开阔，优先在外做任务，室内狭窄易被埋伏。
搜索时重点翻柜子和树叶，藏身点是本图最大威胁来源。
结伴行动更重要：无风管，落单=几乎必死。互相做不在场证明。
duck: 利用树叶/柜子藏身伏击，没风管要靠走位和时机，耐心等目标落单。
把目标引到侧厅拐角等遮挡区，卡视野后快速处理尸体或拖走。
无监控，刀法相对自由，但必须提前规划好不在场（和别人一起任务或报点）。
会议时可声称在藏身点观察，制造信息混乱。
neutral: 鹈鹕在二楼封闭房间吞人不易被发现，吞完最好留在室内等会议。
其他中立可利用柜子/树叶做短暂躲藏，观察局势再行动。

goose: No vents — anyone vanishing is highly suspicious. Immediately question and search nearby foliage/cabinets.
Outdoor courtyard has open sightlines; prioritize tasks outside where indoor ambushes are harder.
When clearing, specifically check cabinets and foliage — these are the map's biggest threat.
Buddy system is critical: no vents means solo = almost certain death. Create mutual alibis.
duck: Use foliage and cabinets for ambushes. No vents means pure movement and timing — wait for isolation.
Lure targets into side hall corners and blocked areas, vision block, then dispose or drag body.
No cameras gives kill freedom, but you must pre-plan a solid alibi (task with others or callout timing).
In meetings claim you were in a hide spot observing to sow doubt.
neutral: Pelican swallows safest in enclosed upstairs rooms; stay inside until meeting after swallowing.
Other neutrals can use short-term cabinet/foliage hides to observe before committing.

tips: 全图无通风管，凭空消失=可疑
可藏身树叶和柜子，搜身时留意
tipsEn: Entire map has no vents — vanishing = suspicious.
Foliage and cabinets are common hides; search them when clearing.

maps.name: 鹅教堂
maps.summary: 夜晚的维多利亚伦敦村落，多建筑与小巷，南侧临水，工程师可长期藏身。
maps.summaryEn: Nighttime Victorian London village with many buildings and alleys; south side borders water. Engineers can hide long-term.
tips: 小巷多、易制造单独相处
工程师在本图可长期藏匿，注意防范
tipsEn: Many alleys make it easy to end up alone with someone.
Engineers can hide long-term here — stay vigilant.

annotations.label: 会议拉铃
annotations.note: 紧急会议拉铃在法院，出事第一时间往中部跑拉铃盘逻辑。
annotations.noteEn: Emergency bell is in the courthouse; run center immediately on incident to call meeting and establish logic.

annotations.label: 监狱机制
annotations.note: 投票平局或无人出局时得票最多者入狱，钥匙随机刷新，锁匠鹅可随时开锁救人。
annotations.noteEn: Most-voted player jailed on tie/no-exile; keys spawn randomly. Locksmith geese can free them anytime.

annotations.label: 广场下毒
annotations.note: 鸭子在广场下毒后，鹅必须限时跑到最右侧红灯区水泵换水解毒，长途路上极易被截杀。
annotations.noteEn: After poison in square, geese must rush to far-right red-light pump to purify in time; long route is perfect for intercepts.

annotations.label: 工厂浓雾
annotations.note: 工厂可放浓雾全图无差别遮视野，雾起时千万别落单，鸭子最爱趁雾刀人。
annotations.noteEn: Factory can release fog that blinds everyone; never be alone in fog — ducks love fog kills.

annotations.label: 仓库火灾
annotations.note: 仓库起火需鹅阵营限时灭火，扎堆灭火时小心鸭子混在人群里补刀。
annotations.noteEn: Geese must extinguish warehouse fire in time; ducks mix in the crowd to backstab clustered players.

annotations.label: 下水道入口
annotations.note: 全图7处下水道全部互通，鸭子与工程师可藏匿和跨区位移，本图工程师能长期蹲坑，记得排查。
annotations.noteEn: All 7 sewers interconnect; ducks & engineers hide and travel across map. Engineers camp long here — always sweep.

annotations.label: 码头刀点
annotations.note: 钓鱼、洗甲板任务背对街巷又临水，落单做任务极易被刀，务必结伴。
annotations.noteEn: Fishing/deck wash tasks face away from alleys and water; solo players here are easy kills — pair up.

annotations.label: 街巷盲区
annotations.note: 全图无监控覆盖，中部小巷多易被带到单独相处，鸭子常在此卡视野单杀。
annotations.noteEn: No camera coverage on map; central alleys easy for isolating players. Ducks frequently vision-block kills here.

goose: 下水道互通，工程师可长期蹲守，记得排查所有入口避免被偷袭。
毒气和火灾要立刻结伴去修，落单去远端极易被刀。
浓雾时抱团，千万别单独行动，工厂附近尤其危险。
监狱机制重要，锁匠要保护好钥匙，关键鹅被关时及时救。
duck: 利用下水道快速跨区，毒气和火灾时混入人群补刀最稳。
浓雾是最佳杀人时机，全图视野差可大胆行动后撤离。
把目标带到街巷盲区卡视野，码头任务区背对水也很适合。
监狱关人后故意不给钥匙，拖延鹅方节奏。
neutral: 鹈鹕可在建筑内或下水道吞人，浓雾中吞人更隐蔽。
其他中立可借下水道和建筑躲藏观察局势。

goose: Sewers connect everything — Engineers can camp long-term; always sweep all entrances to avoid surprise attacks.
Poison and fire require immediate paired repairs; solo trips to far ends are easy kills.
In fog, stay grouped — never act alone, especially near the factory.
Jail is critical; Locksmith must guard keys and free key Geese promptly.
duck: Use sewers for fast cross-map movement; blend into crowds during poison/fire for backstabs.
Fog is prime killing time — full map vision loss lets you act boldly then escape.
Lure targets into alley blind spots for vision blocks; dock task area facing water is perfect.
Jail key players and deliberately withhold keys to stall Geese.
neutral: Pelican can swallow inside buildings or sewers; fog makes it even safer.
Other neutrals can use sewers and buildings for hiding and observing.

maps.name: 地下室
maps.summary: 小型封闭地下室，节奏快、遭遇频繁，工程师可长期藏身。
maps.summaryEn: Small enclosed basement; fast pace with frequent encounters. Engineers can hide long-term.
tips: 图小节奏快，刀法频繁，发言信息密度高
工程师可长期藏匿在隐蔽点
tipsEn: Small map = fast pace, frequent stabs, high-density discussion.
Engineers can hide indefinitely in concealed spots.

annotations.label: 会议拉铃
annotations.note: 全场唯一拉铃在祭坛，每人每局只能拉一次，别浪费报警机会
annotations.noteEn: Only bell on map is at the altar; each player can call only once per game — don't waste it.

annotations.label: 投喂神明
annotations.note: 1分钟倒计时内喂3个食物的限时任务，单人蹲书房易被卡视野刀
annotations.noteEn: Timed task: feed 3 items in 1 min; book room solo is easy vision-block kill target.

annotations.label: 找铃铛
annotations.note: 坑内找铃铛任务点，做完『表示敬意』才开隧道入口，下坑注意身后
annotations.noteEn: Bell-search task inside pit; only after 'pay respects' does tunnel open — watch your back when going down.

annotations.label: 迷宫刀点
annotations.note: 隧道迷宫人流稀少、尸体难被发现，鸭子最爱在此堵落单的鹅
annotations.noteEn: Tunnel maze has low traffic and hidden bodies; ducks love blocking solo geese here.

annotations.label: 水域毁尸
annotations.note: 雾洞上方水域是送葬者毁尸点，尸体入水即无尸可报，盘逻辑要算上失踪人口
annotations.noteEn: Water above fog cave is undertaker disposal; bodies in water = no corpse report. Count missing players in logic.

annotations.label: 火炉毁尸
annotations.note: 锅炉房火炉可烧尸灭迹，撞见拖尸的直接去祭坛拉铃
annotations.noteEn: Boiler furnace burns bodies; if you see a dragger, immediately call meeting at altar.

annotations.label: 书架藏点
annotations.note: 礼堂左上角两书架间的箱子，工程师可永久藏身偷听过路发言
annotations.noteEn: Box between two bookshelves upper-left auditorium; engineers can permanently hide and eavesdrop.

annotations.label: 木桶藏身
annotations.note: 储物间左侧木桶是常用藏点，查岗清图时记得绕过去敲一遍
annotations.noteEn: Left barrel in storage is common hide; when clearing, remember to check around it.

annotations.label: 全图关灯
annotations.note: 实验室破坏点，关灯后鹅视野骤减极易被单杀，结伴来修灯别落单
annotations.noteEn: Lab sabotage blacks out map; geese vision drops sharply — pair up to fix lights.

goose: 小地图节奏快，尽量结伴，别单独下坑或进死角。
工程师可利用长期藏身优势蹲守关键区域，报告破坏位置。
关灯时立刻结伴去修，别让鸭子利用黑暗单杀。
会议铃只能拉一次，关键时刻别浪费，优先在有证据时拉。
duck: 利用小地图快速接近目标，通风管可快速换位找单。
关灯破坏后趁视野差秒杀，然后迅速通风或藏好。
下坑或死角是好刀点，但注意别被工程师藏着看到。
别急着拉会议铃，拖时间让好人更慌。
neutral: 鹈鹕适合吞刀后在小地图边缘慢慢消化到会议。
其他中立可借小地图混乱藏身或求票。

goose: Fast pace on small map — always pair up, never go down the pit or into dead-ends alone.
Engineer can use long-hide advantage to camp key zones and report sabotage locations.
On lights out, immediately group up to fix — don't let Ducks use darkness for solo kills.
The meeting bell can only be rung once — save it for when you have solid evidence.
duck: Small map lets you close distance fast; use vents to reposition and find isolates.
Sabotage lights then kill in the dark, then vent or hide quickly.
Pit and dead-ends are strong kill spots but watch for hiding Engineers.
Don't rush to call meetings — let the Geese get more paranoid.
neutral: Pelican can swallow armed players then slowly digest on the edges until meeting.
Other neutrals can use the chaos of the small map to hide or fish for votes.

maps.name: 血港
maps.summary: 维多利亚黑暗港湾，含昼夜循环与腐化机制，两处藏尸区与专属破坏。
maps.summaryEn: Victorian dark harbor with day/night cycle and corruption mechanics; two body disposal areas and unique sabotages.
tips: 有昼夜循环与腐化，注意腐化扩散
两处藏尸区，报尸前留意尸体可能被转移
tipsEn: Day/night + corruption mechanics — watch corruption spread.
Two disposal areas; confirm bodies haven't been moved by undertaker before reporting.

annotations.label: 教堂敲钟
annotations.note: 会议靠敲钟发起，夜晚和自身腐化状态敲不了，鸭子刀人后掐着入夜时机最难被叫会。
annotations.noteEn: Meetings started by ringing bell; can't ring at night or when corrupted. Ducks time kills right before nightfall to delay meetings.

annotations.label: 广场任务区
annotations.note: 全镇人流最大的十字口，好人结伴做任务互相作证，落单穿巷容易被尾随。
annotations.noteEn: Busiest crossroads; pair up for tasks and mutual alibis. Solo alley crossing invites tails.

annotations.label: 火炉销尸
annotations.note: 停尸房火炉可直接销毁尸体，报尸前先确认尸体没被送葬者搬走，开棺材还有低概率惊吓彩蛋。
annotations.noteEn: Morgue furnace destroys bodies outright. Before reporting, ensure undertaker hasn't moved it; coffins have rare scare easter egg.

annotations.label: 衣柜藏尸
annotations.note: 医院衣柜是另一处藏尸点，鸭子刀完顺手塞柜，好人路过多开柜检查少背锅。
annotations.noteEn: Hospital closet is alternate disposal; ducks stuff bodies post-kill. Open extra closets when passing to avoid false reports.

annotations.label: 毒化水泵
annotations.note: 致命级破坏限时60秒，必须跑到左上水井旁的水泵修复，落单去修极易被守点刀。
annotations.noteEn: Lethal sabotage, 60s timer; must reach upper-left well pump. Solo repairs are easy camp kills.

annotations.label: 献祭之钟
annotations.note: 墓地破坏后钟随机刷新，超时强制开献祭会议，响铃后全员第一时间分头找钟。
annotations.noteEn: After graveyard sabotage, bell spawns randomly; timeout forces sacrificial meeting. Everyone splits to find bell on ring.

annotations.label: 药铺死角
annotations.note: 右上角人流稀少且无监控，鸭子常在此卡视野单杀后走右侧通道溜进墓地。
annotations.noteEn: Upper-right low traffic, no cameras; ducks vision-block kills then slip into graveyard via right path.

annotations.label: 公园树丛
annotations.note: 树丛遮挡视野，夜晚只有鸭子看得到名字，别独自在这盘逻辑，容易落单被刀。
annotations.noteEn: Bushes block vision; at night only ducks see names. Don't discuss logic alone here or you get isolated and killed.

maps.name: 丛林神庙
maps.summary: 丛林古庙，鸭子可激活死亡陷阱（如滚石），瞬间清掉路过玩家。
maps.summaryEn: Jungle ancient temple; ducks can activate lethal traps (e.g. rolling boulders) that instantly eliminate passersby.
tips: 小心鸭子激活的死亡陷阱，别在陷阱通道久留
陷阱致死不算刀，排查时别误判
tipsEn: Watch for ducks activating death traps; don't linger in trap corridors.
Trap deaths don't count as kills — don't misjudge during investigation.

annotations.label: 献祭钟
annotations.note: 敬拜坑中央的献祭钟即会议按钮，靠近按E或左键就能拍，出事先抢钟别犹豫。
annotations.noteEn: Worship bell in central pit is the meeting button; press E/LMB near it. Call meeting quickly on incident.

annotations.label: 滚石通道
annotations.note: 鸭子激活滚石后沿固定路径碾人，直接秒杀不留尸也不算刀，别在通道里久留盘逻辑。
annotations.noteEn: Ducks activate rolling boulder along fixed path that crushes anyone; instant death, no body, not a stab. Don't discuss in corridor.

annotations.label: 北口迷雾
annotations.note: 墓室北入口有迷雾，鸭子、模仿者和鸽子都能进，雾外能听到雾内屁声可用来排人。
annotations.noteEn: Fog at north tomb entrance; ducks, mimics and pigeons can enter. Hear farts from outside to identify.

annotations.label: 召唤黑暗
annotations.note: 鸭子在墓室关灯后全图变暗，鹅要分头去重燃各处火把开灯，黑暗中落单极易吃刀。
annotations.noteEn: Duck turns off lights in tomb; whole map darkens. Geese must relight torches in groups — solo in dark = easy kill.

annotations.label: 木桥危险
annotations.note: 通往王座室的木桥可被鸭子破坏，过桥别停留，更别在桥上站着盘逻辑。
annotations.noteEn: Bridge to throne room can be sabotaged by ducks; don't stop or discuss logic while crossing.

annotations.label: 训练场刀点
annotations.note: 西侧偏僻且本图无监控覆盖，训练场的门被破坏后落单玩家常在此被卡视野单杀。
annotations.noteEn: Remote west side, no cameras; after door sabotage solo players frequently vision-block killed here.

annotations.label: 东口迷雾
annotations.note: 暂存准备区东入口的迷雾是常见蹲点，有人从雾里凭空走出要先记一笔再盘。
annotations.noteEn: East staging area fog is common camp spot; note anyone emerging from fog before accusing.

annotations.label: 下水道
annotations.note: 地下下水道有多处入口可藏身，排查路过时记得扫一眼，别给鸭子留转点空间。
annotations.noteEn: Underground sewers have multiple entrances for hiding; sweep when passing to prevent duck rotation space.

annotations.label: 通风口
annotations.note: 本图有通风口但连通关系无公开资料，看到人凭空出现或消失多半是钻了风口。
annotations.noteEn: Vents exist but connections undocumented; sudden appear/disappear likely vent travel.

goose: 木桥和训练场是高危区，过桥或做任务一定要结伴，别停留盘逻辑。
下水道和隐藏点多，路过时一定要扫一眼，防止鸭子藏匿。
死亡陷阱激活后立刻撤离王座室区域，滚石范围很大。
通风口连通关系不明，看到突然出现/消失的人优先怀疑鸭子。
duck: 激活死亡陷阱后守在附近收割路过玩家，滚石能瞬间清场。
破坏木桥后守桥两端，鹅过桥时卡视野或直接推下水。
下水道是完美藏身和转移点，训练场门破坏后可长期蹲守。
通风口突然出现能制造不在场，配合陷阱杀非常强。
neutral: 鹈鹕可在下水道或隐藏点吞人，滚石陷阱触发时吞人最安全。
其他中立可利用下水道长期藏身等到残局。

goose: Wooden bridge and training grounds are high-risk — always pair up when crossing or tasking, never stop to discuss logic.
Sewers and hides are plentiful; always sweep when passing to prevent Duck camping.
After death trap activation, evacuate throne room area immediately — boulders have huge range.
Vent connections unknown; anyone suddenly appearing/disappearing is likely a Duck.
duck: Activate death traps then camp nearby to harvest passersby — boulders clear groups instantly.
Sabotage the bridge and camp both ends; vision-block or push Geese into water as they cross.
Sewers are perfect hides and rotation spots; after sabotaging training door you can camp long-term.
Sudden vent appearances create perfect alibis — combines extremely well with traps.
neutral: Pelican can swallow safely in sewers or hides, especially when traps trigger.
Other neutrals can use sewers for long-term hiding until endgame.

maps.name: 古代沙地
maps.summary: 古埃及沙漠遗迹，有沙暴机制与禁忌通道，部分角色为本图专属。
maps.summaryEn: Ancient Egyptian desert ruins featuring sandstorm mechanics and forbidden passages; some roles are map-exclusive.
tips: 沙暴期间室外视野受限，注意走位
街头顽童/追踪者为本图专属角色
tipsEn: During sandstorms, outdoor vision is limited — mind your positioning.
Street Urchin / Tracker are exclusive to this map.

annotations.label: 会议铃
annotations.note: 位于金字塔入口前的街道上，按铃会重置已召唤的木乃伊；纵火/献祭铃破坏期间按不了铃，只能报尸开会。
annotations.noteEn: Bell on street in front of pyramid entrance; ringing resets summoned mummy. Can't ring during arson/sacrifice sabotage — only report bodies.

annotations.label: 召唤木乃伊
annotations.note: 图书馆被破坏后木乃伊从金字塔顶管道出现，自动追杀最近玩家且无法击杀，落单的人最容易被白给。
annotations.noteEn: After library sabotage, mummy emerges from pyramid top pipe, auto-hunts nearest and can't be killed; loners are easy victims.

annotations.label: 神庙窥视孔
annotations.note: 鹅蛋神庙内可透过窥视孔观察外部动向，好人蹲点记行动轨迹，会上盘逻辑有据可依。
annotations.noteEn: Inside goose egg temple, use peephole to observe outside; note movement paths for solid meeting logic.

annotations.label: 献祭之铃
annotations.note: 工匠之家被破坏后全图随机刷铃，没人及时捡就强制开会，平票/跳过还会随机驱逐非鸭玩家，必须分人跑铃。
annotations.noteEn: After craftsman house sabotage bell spawns randomly; timeout forces meeting. Ties/skips randomly exile non-ducks — assign runners.

annotations.label: 沙暴盲区
annotations.note: 沙暴周期性压缩室外视野，空旷沙地无监控覆盖，鸭子常趁沙暴卡视野单杀，尽量结伴或进屋规避。
annotations.noteEn: Periodic sandstorms limit outdoor view; open sands have no camera. Ducks use storms for vision kills — pair up or shelter indoors.

annotations.label: 水塘取水
annotations.note: 金字塔东南的灭火取水点，纵火时这里人流最密，往返路上极易被鸭子贴脸跟刀。
annotations.noteEn: Water source SE of pyramid for firefighting; heaviest traffic during arson. Ducks knife on return trips.

annotations.label: 船上钓鱼
annotations.note: 钓鱼任务只能在北港-南港自动往返的小船上做；木乃伊在场时船停驶，上船等于短暂落单。
annotations.noteEn: Fishing only on auto-loop boat between N/S ports; boat stops if mummy present. Boarding = brief isolation.

annotations.label: 纵火点
annotations.note: 右下角供应小屋被点火后必须去水塘打水多次往返灭火，拖到超时鸭子直接获胜，优先级最高。
annotations.noteEn: Supply hut bottom-right set on fire; multiple trips to pond to extinguish or ducks win on timeout. Highest priority.

annotations.label: 禁忌通道
annotations.note: 本图无传统通风口，鸭子/鸽子/模仿者走禁忌通道穿图，还可上右上角屋顶魔镜远程偷听好人盘逻辑。
annotations.noteEn: No classic vents; ducks/pigeons/mimics use forbidden passages to cross map. Can also use rooftop magic mirror to eavesdrop.

goose: 沙暴时优先室内任务，室外视野差容易被卡杀。
沙暴破坏和纵火是高优先级，必须立刻多人去修。
禁忌通道和屋顶魔镜是鸭子专属，记得排查屋顶。
召唤木乃伊时别停在通道，提前规划逃生路线。
duck: 沙暴时室外是绝佳刀点，结合禁忌通道快速转移。
点火后守在水塘附近拦截灭火鹅，拖延时间就是胜利。
屋顶魔镜可远程听盘逻辑，提前布局。
召唤木乃伊后守在必经之路收割。
neutral: 跟踪者/街头顽童在本图有优势，利用通道和沙暴。
中立可藏在禁忌通道等待残局。

goose: During sandstorm prioritize indoor tasks — outdoor vision loss makes you easy prey.
Sandstorm sabotage and arson are highest priority — send multiple people immediately.
Forbidden passages and rooftop magic mirror are Duck-only; always check rooftops.
When mummy is summoned don't linger in corridors — plan escape routes early.
duck: Sandstorm makes outdoors perfect for kills; use forbidden passages for fast repositioning.
After starting fire, camp the pond to intercept firefighters and run out the timer.
Rooftop magic mirror lets you eavesdrop on discussions from safety.
Summon mummy then camp the path players must take.
neutral: Tracker / Street Urchin excel here — use passages and storms to your advantage.
Neutrals can hide in forbidden passages until endgame.

maps.name: 鹰镇温泉
maps.summary: 小镇温泉度假地，较新地图，动线与机制需实战熟悉。
maps.summaryEn: Small-town hot springs resort; newer map — learn routes and mechanics through play.
tips: 较新地图，多数人点位不熟，先摸清动线
tipsEn: Newer map; most players don't know the spots yet — learn routes first.

annotations.label: 会议按钮
annotations.note: 镇中心主街街口的喇叭按钮，校车破坏期间冲按钮容易被车撞，先看路再报警。
annotations.noteEn: Horn button at main street intersection; rushing button during bus sabotage risks getting hit — look both ways.

annotations.label: 校车碾压
annotations.note: 校车破坏后沿主街双向碾压路上所有人（友军同伤、冒险家免疫），解除前别在街面落单逗留。
annotations.noteEn: Sabotaged bus drives both ways crushing everyone on main street (friendly fire, Adventurer immune); don't linger alone before fixed.

annotations.label: 案件重演
annotations.note: 警长局是案件重演任务点兼随机关门解除点，关门破坏时人流密集，鸭子常趁乱混身份。
annotations.noteEn: Sheriff office is reenactment task + random door unlock. During door sabotage crowds form; ducks blend in chaos.

annotations.label: 回春舱
annotations.note: 回春舱每3分钟可洗掉静默/炸弹/丘比特等负面状态，被禁用时全队没了保险，优先来此解除。
annotations.noteEn: Pod clears silence/bomb/cupid debuffs every 3 min; when disabled the team loses safety net — prioritize fix.

annotations.label: 电话输码
annotations.note: 电话被破坏后要在电台输码解除，输码时背对门口，鸭子爱在这堵门刀落单的好人。
annotations.noteEn: After phone sabotage enter code at radio station; back faces door — ducks love door-blocking solo players here.

annotations.label: 通风口
annotations.note: 本图通风口不互通房间、全部直下下水道层，出来只能走梯子，盯住梯口能直接盘出钻管的鸭子。
annotations.noteEn: Vents drop straight to sewer level, not between rooms; exit only via ladders. Watch ladder exits to catch venters.

annotations.label: 下水道刀点
annotations.note: 下水道无监控且部分鸭子能变形加速，落单下来清污染极易被堵刀，至少双人同行。
annotations.noteEn: No cameras in sewer + some ducks have shape-shift speed; solo pollution clear = easy block kill. At least pairs.

annotations.label: 隐藏密室
annotations.note: 下水道深处有全游戏唯一隐藏密室（忍者神龟彩蛋，需特定破坏组合开启），冷门藏身位。
annotations.noteEn: Deep sewer contains the game's only hidden chamber (TMNT easter egg, specific sabotage combo to open) — rare hide.

annotations.label: 公园盲区
annotations.note: 公园在主街东段尽头、全图无监控覆盖，鸭子常在此卡视野单杀，落单别往里走。
annotations.noteEn: Park at east end of main street; zero camera coverage. Ducks vision-block kills here — don't go in alone.

goose: 回春舱和电话是高优先级任务，背对门口时一定要有人盯梢。
公园和隐藏密室是刀点，落单绝对不要进去。
关门破坏时人流密集，注意混入的人身份。
下水道梯口盯紧，出来的人要验证身份。
duck: 破坏电话后守在电台门口堵人，背对的鹅最容易刀。
公园盲区无监控，完美卡视野单杀点。
利用关门混乱混身份，隐藏密室是长期藏身位。
破坏回春舱让鹅失去解除负面状态的能力。
neutral: 忍者可利用下水道和隐藏密室长期潜伏。
中立可借公园和密室观察残局。

goose: Rejuvenation Pod and Phone Code are high priority — when your back is to the door always have someone watching.
Park and hidden chamber are kill zones — never enter alone.
During door sabotage crowds form; watch for people blending in.
Watch sewer ladder exits — verify anyone who comes up.
duck: After phone sabotage camp the radio door — players facing away are easy kills.
Park blind spot has zero cameras — perfect vision block solo kills.
Use door sabotage chaos to blend identities; hidden chamber is a long-term hide.
Disable rejuvenation pod to remove the team's safety net for debuffs.
neutral: Ninja can use sewers and hidden chamber for long-term stealth.
Neutrals can observe endgame from park or chamber.

maps.name: 嘉年华
maps.summary: 热闹游乐园，有监控、对讲机与前置任务，含本图专属角色。
maps.summaryEn: Bustling carnival with CCTV, walkie-talkies and pre-tasks; includes map-exclusive roles.
tips: 有监控与对讲机，刀前先确认监控
科学家为嘉年华专属角色
tipsEn: Has cameras and walkie-talkies; check monitors before killing.
Scientist is carnival-exclusive role.

annotations.label: 召集铃
annotations.note: 全图唯一会议铃在帐篷内11点钟方位，发现异常别犹豫直接摇铃盘逻辑。
annotations.noteEn: Only meeting bell inside tent at ~11 o'clock position; shake immediately on suspicion to call meeting.

annotations.label: 老虎毁尸
annotations.note: 老虎附近的尸体会被直接吃掉消失，鸭在帐篷里刀人等于自带毁尸。
annotations.noteEn: Bodies near tiger get eaten and vanish instantly; killing inside tent auto-disposes.

annotations.label: 过山车
annotations.note: 过山车被破坏时轨道顶点乘客全部坠亡且不留尸体，残局千万别全员上车。
annotations.noteEn: When sabotaged, coaster riders at peak fall to death with no corpse; late game never board as full team.

annotations.label: 监控前置
annotations.note: 鹅做完前置任务CCTV才会亮，外墙发电机再解锁对讲机，鸭刀前务必确认监控开没开。
annotations.noteEn: CCTV activates only after geese complete pre-task; outer generator unlocks radio. Confirm cameras are live before kills.

annotations.label: 占卜屋
annotations.note: 右侧边缘小屋人流稀少，落单进屋常被鸭堵门单杀。
annotations.noteEn: Low-traffic edge booth; solo entry often results in ducks blocking door for kill.

annotations.label: 怪奇轮盘
annotations.note: 攒4张门票转轮盘随机拿加速/加票等增益，持票玩家是鸭抢票的优先刀目标。
annotations.noteEn: Save 4 tickets to spin for buffs (speed, extra tickets etc). Ticket holders are priority duck targets.

annotations.label: 南站台死角
annotations.note: 地图角落监控难覆盖，鸭刀完可坐过山车秒回北区做不在场证明。
annotations.noteEn: Corner with poor camera coverage; ducks can kill then ride coaster back north instantly for alibi.

annotations.label: 限时破坏
annotations.note: 清垃圾/抓兔子限时不处理直接鸭胜，开阔地分头响应但别落单。
annotations.noteEn: Trash/rabbit timed sabotages: failure = duck win. Spread out to respond but don't go solo in open.

goose: 占卜屋和怪奇轮盘人流少，做任务时要结伴或让别人盯门。
南站台和过山车是刀点，坐车后立刻报点证明不在场。
限时破坏要分头响应但保持视线接触，别落单。
监控和对讲机要充分利用，报告可疑走位。
duck: 堵占卜屋或轮盘门口刀落单玩家，轮盘持票者优先。
南站台刀完立刻坐过山车回北区制造不在场。
限时破坏时混在响应人群里补刀，开阔地容易得手。
用对讲机和监控假装好人报点混身份。
neutral: 鹈鹕可在边缘小屋或站台吞人。
中立可利用过山车快速转移观察。

goose: Fortune booth and mystery wheel have low traffic — task with a buddy or have someone watch the door.
South platform and coaster are kill zones; after riding immediately call to prove your location.
Timed sabotages require spread response but maintain line of sight — no solos.
Use cameras and walkie-talkies heavily; report suspicious movement.
duck: Block fortune booth or wheel doors to kill isolated players; ticket holders are priority.
Kill at south platform then immediately ride coaster north for perfect alibi.
Blend into the response group during timed sabotages — open areas are easy kills.
Use walkie-talkies and cameras to fake being a good guy calling info.
neutral: Pelican can swallow in edge booths or platforms.
Neutrals can use the coaster for fast relocation and observation.

maps.name: 哥斯拉镇
maps.summary: 巨型怪兽主题地图，可用望远镜观察远处，角落适合鸭/鹈鹕动手。
maps.summaryEn: Giant kaiju-themed map; use telescopes to observe distant areas. Corners are ideal for ducks/pelicans.
tips: 可用望远镜随时观察远处，但视角是角落
角落隐蔽，适合伏击也要防伏击
tipsEn: Telescopes let you scout distant areas but view is corner-limited.
Corners are hidden; great for ambushes but also vulnerable to them.

annotations.label: 会议按钮
annotations.note: 按钮在对策中心左上方露天处，这里也会被怪兽热线命中，跑去开会的路上可能直接被汽化
annotations.noteEn: Button is exposed upper-left of strategy center; also hit by kaiju hotline. You may be vaporized en route.

annotations.label: 对策电脑
annotations.note: 电脑按1-16编号显示全部建筑，可提前查到下一次热线落点，好人报点盘逻辑、躲热线全靠它
annotations.noteEn: Computer shows all buildings 1-16; pre-check next hotline landing. Essential for reporting and dodging hotlines.

annotations.label: 栈桥钓鱼
annotations.note: 本图特有拉力条式钓鱼任务，钓鱼时背对街道极易被摸刀，建议结伴或先扫一眼周围再做
annotations.noteEn: Map-unique tension-bar fishing on pier; back to street while fishing = easy knife. Pair up or sweep area first.

annotations.label: 电线杆修电
annotations.note: 断电后要在咖啡店右侧电线杆连对4根线，修电背身又落单，是鸭子最爱的补刀点
annotations.noteEn: After blackout connect 4 wires on pole right of cafe; back turned + alone = favorite duck cleanup spot.

annotations.label: 望远镜角落
annotations.note: 望远镜可随时远程观察，但位置卡在角落，鸭子/鹈鹕常蹲这里单杀来用镜的落单好人
annotations.noteEn: Telescopes allow remote view but corner location; ducks/pelicans camp to solo-kill players using scope.

annotations.label: 怪兽热线
annotations.note: 怪兽周期性从海中现身咆哮后向随机建筑放热线，命中区域内直接汽化不留尸体，关门贴门站也躲不掉
annotations.noteEn: Kaiju periodically surfaces, roars, and targets random building with deadly beam; instant vaporize no corpse. Door-stacking won't save you.

annotations.label: 天坑毁尸
annotations.note: 地图随机刷出天坑，在坑边击杀尸体直接消失（类似地下室熔炉），有坑的局路过多看一眼
annotations.noteEn: Random sinkholes appear; bodies killed near edge vanish (like basement furnace). Check extra when pits are active.

annotations.label: 外围街区
annotations.note: 便利店/漫画店一带人流稀少又远离中央街道，落单做任务容易被卡视野单杀，报点要带建筑名
annotations.noteEn: Convenience/comic shop area low traffic, far from center; solo tasks easy vision kills. Include building name in reports.
